item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h ROUND-UP: There were wins in the @ElectricIreland Connacht Minor Football Championship this
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h ROUND-UP: There were wins in the @ElectricIreland Connacht Minor Football Championship this evening for @Galway_GAA and @sligogaa . #GAABelong De gaa.ie 2 1 2 mil
